creator: koobs.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
- Update to 0.7.0
- Remove LICENSE_FILE for well-known licenses ;)
- Remove DOCSDIR and NOPORTDOCS checks - Not bundled by upstream anymore
- Update and sort pkg-plist (lwhsu taught me this)

Changes:

https://code.google.com/p/pyftpdlib/source/browse/tags/release-0.7.0/HISTORY

--------------------

@lwhsu FYI: You'll notice this message on install:

-------------------------------------
You might want to install pysendfile module to speedup transfers:
http://code.google.com/p/pysendfile/
-------------------------------------

I've prepared a new port for the new py-pysendfile, but upstream tarball is
incorrectly versioned, 2.0.0 instead of 0.2.0. Have submitted an issue, and
I'll add SENDFILE OPTIONS to this port when it's done and committed.
py-pysendfile is a fork and updated version of devel/py-sendfile (not ==)

Added file(s):
- files/patch-setup.py

Port maintainer (lwhsu@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: update, diff: ports)
